TimeEntry.Title: Accessed the Cisco Umbrella portal to verify that all computers are properly syncing with the portal and appearing as expected.
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed the Cisco Umbrella portal to verify that all computers are properly syncing with the portal and appearing as expected..

TimeEntry.Title: PONO,LPT-EREAD,B2I-HQ-WINEDGE has Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.then rebooted..Scanned the devices Some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.


Patches are 
Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) (7.0.1.34140)
2026-03 Cumulative Update for Windows 11, version 25H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5086672) (26200.8117)
Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business Current Channel for x64 2603 of version(19822.20142)

Machines are :PONO,LPT-EREAD,B2I-HQ-WINEDGE

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for B2I:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the B2I:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for B2I:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the B2I:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket.

TimeEntry.Title: ICAZA,LPT-EREAD,LAPTOP-CO9S1K5I : Manually patch update as APD couldn't execute
TimeEntry.Notes:
• ICAZA: 2026-03 Cumulative Update for Windows 10 Version 22H2 for x64-based Systems (KB5078885) (ESU)
  • ICAZA: Comet Lake PCH CNVi WiFi [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_06F0] – 24.20.2.1
  • LPT-EREAD: Comet Lake PCH CNVi WiFi [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_06F0] – 24.20.2.1
  • LAPTOP-CO9S1K5I: Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) – 7.0.1.34140

All patches were also updated into myrmm.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: APD failed to update Cisco umbrella, manually updated on LPT-EREAD and ICAZA
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to LPT-EREAD and ICAZA machines and deployed the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (5.1.16.194). I verified all systems were successfully synced over cisco portal.

TimeEntry.Title: APD failed to update Cisco umbrella, manually updated on LPT-EREAD and ICAZA
TimeEntry.Notes: Connected to LPT-EREAD and ICAZA machines and deployed the latest version of Cisco Secure Client (5.1.16.194). I verified all systems were successfully synced over cisco portal.

TimeEntry.Title: Update Missing ptach on the Jared-Friedman-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the missing/failed patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the pending updates for the system Jared-Friedman-PC.

Downloaded and manually installed the applicable driver and firmware updates, including:

  • Meteor Lake PCH CNVi WiFi [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_7E40] (24.20.0.4)
  • Meteor Lake-P (Intel Arc Graphics) [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_7D55] (32.0.101.8424)
  • Lenovo Firmware Update – 21KS (1.26)

Completed the installation process and verified the updated driver and firmware versions on the system.

Performed a post-installation scan to confirm compliance. All previously missing patches are now successfully installed and reflecting compliant status in the ManageEngine console.

a reboot is required to finalize the installation due so open files .

TimeEntry.Title: Update Missing ptach on the Jared-Friedman-PC
TimeEntry.Notes:
Worked on the missing/failed patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the pending updates for the system Jared-Friedman-PC.

Downloaded and manually installed the applicable driver and firmware updates, including:

  • Meteor Lake PCH CNVi WiFi [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_7E40] (24.20.0.4)
  • Meteor Lake-P (Intel Arc Graphics) [PCI\VEN_8086&DEV_7D55] (32.0.101.8424)
  • Lenovo Firmware Update – 21KS (1.26)

Completed the installation process and verified the updated driver and firmware versions on the system.

Performed a post-installation scan to confirm compliance. All previously missing patches are now successfully installed and reflecting compliant status in the ManageEngine console.

a reboot is required to finalize the installation due so open files .

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Umbrella Agent Syncing Issue with Portal for machines B2I-3CX-LOANER,B2I-HQ-WINEDGE,ColeB2,DESKTOP-7QV89JS
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the Cisco Umbrella portal and identified that machines B2I-3CX-LOANER,B2I-HQ-WINEDGE,ColeB2,DESKTOP-7QV89JS were experiencing syncing issues with the Cisco Umbrella portal. I then connected to the affected machines and addressed the network connectivity settings. After ensuring proper communication between the agent and the portal, the agent is now successfully syncing and communicating with the Cisco Umbrella cloud, with the correct status and configuration reflected in the portal.

TimeEntry.Title: DESKTOP-7QV89JS,LPT-EREAD,Icaza,LPT-CHIO2,ColeB2 : Found syncing issue with sever due to old version, updated
TimeEntry.Notes: I removed the old version and successfully installed the latest version (Cisco Secure Client for Windows 5.1.16.194) over all these machines. They are now syncing properly with the server. I also scanned patch at myrmm and that also updated with latest software updates.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed patches.then rebooted.Scanned the devices Some patches were not applicable due to compatibility issues. All previously missing patches were successfully updated.


 Patches The latest update for Microsoft Defender (1.449.47.0)
NVIDIA app (x64) (11.0.7.237)
Google Chrome (x64) (147.0.7727.55,147.0.7727.56)
Zoom Workplace (EXE) (x64) (User Based) (7.0.2.34412)

Machines:  Jared-Friedman-PC,Laptop-JonM,LPT-EREAD,victoria

TimeEntry.Title: Icaza : Missed by APD, updated failed patches manually
TimeEntry.Notes:
Manually accessed the machine and downloaded all below patches, then deployed them successfully.

Installed update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Business (Current Channel, x86) to version 2603 (Build 19822.20168).

Updated Zoom Workplace (x64, user-based) to version 7.0.2.34412.

Updated Google Chrome (x64) to versions 147.0.7727.55 / 147.0.7727.56.

Applied BIOS/firmware update on Dell XPS 17 9700 to version 1.36.0.

Verified that all above patches are successfully updated and reflected in the MyRMM database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for B2I:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the B2I:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Performed Weekly Firewall Backup for B2I:- Sophos Firewall
TimeEntry.Notes: Logged into the firewall to perform the weekly backup for the B2I:- Sophos Firewall. Downloaded the backup file and placed the same file on the Team Channel under the network config-firewall folder. Hence, closing this ticket....

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for B2I Machine DESKTOP-7QV89JS and LAPTOP-JONM
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines DESKTOP-7QV89JS and LAPTOP-JONM not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Manage Engine Synchronization Issue for B2I Machine DESKTOP-7QV89JS and LAPTOP-JONM
TimeEntry.Notes: Login into Manage engine portal and found the agent on machines DESKTOP-7QV89JS and LAPTOP-JONM not communication with portal. So connected to the machine, tried to restart the service, but nothing happened. So, Uninstall the Corrupt manage engine then download and the latest manage engine agent. After that agent on machine is communicating with the portal and working fine hence closing this ticket

TimeEntry.Notes:
Logged into the client server and then access the following phone. Go to web and download the latest version of firmware for Yealink phone. Upgrade the firmware to latest version on the phone and verify the services on phone is up and working fine.

001565E4C6A3.

TimeEntry.Title: ColeB2,LPT-CHIO2,Laptop-JonM : Manually patch update as APD missed to execute
TimeEntry.Notes:
ColeB2

  • Installed .NET Desktop Runtime (x64) (KB5086096)
  • Updated Microsoft 365 Apps for Business to Version 2603 (Build 19822.20182)
  • Updated Microsoft Visual C++ Redistributable (Version 14.50.35719.0)
  • Updated Google Chrome to versions 147.0.7727.101 / 147.0.7727.102
  • Updated system drivers and firmware:
    • High Definition Audio Driver
    • Lenovo Firmware Update
    • Intel Graphics and WiFi drivers (Tiger Lake platform)
  • Updated Zoom Workplace
  • Updated DisplayLink Graphics
  • Updated Parallels Client
  • Installed Microsoft Teams Machine-Wide Installer
  • Installed Microsoft Malicious Software Removal Tool

LPT-CHIO2

  • Installed 2025-11 Cumulative Update for Windows 11 (KB5068865 – CVE-2025-62215)

Laptop-JonM

  • Installed 2026-04 Cumulative Update for .NET Framework (KB5082417)
  • Installed 2026-04 Cumulative Update for Windows 11 (KB5083769 – Build 26200.8246)

 

Myrmm also updated with these patches, few of the patches will reflect after reboot, which requires.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: Missing patch update on the LAPTOP-CO9S1K5I and Victoria
TimeEntry.Notes:
Devices LAPTOP-CO9S1K5I and Victoria were identified as non-compliant due to missing patches.

Logged in to the ManageEngine portal and verified pending updates on both systems. Proceeded with patch remediation by installing the following updates:

  • Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) – Version 147.0.3912.72
  • Microsoft Edge for Chromium Business (x64) – Version 147.0.3912.72
  • Google Chrome (x64) – Versions 147.0.7727.101 / 147.0.7727.102

After installation, performed a manual patch scan on both systems to verify successful deployment and to clear the non-compliant status.

Post validation, confirmed that all patches have been successfully applied and no high vulnerabilities remain. Both systems are now compliant as per patch management policy.

TimeEntry.Title: Update Missing patch on the B2I-HQ-WINEDGE
TimeEntry.Notes:
The device B2I-HQ-WINEDGE was identified with pending updates for Microsoft WebView2 Runtime (x64) (147.0.3912.72) and Microsoft Edge for Chromium Business (x64) (147.0.3912.72). These updates are required to address security vulnerabilities and ensure the system remains compliant.

Patch deployment is pending/completed (adjust as needed). Post-update, the device will be re-scanned to confirm that all vulnerabilities are resolved and compliance status is achieve
